/opt/homebrew/lib/python3.14/site-packages/numpy/_core/_methods.py:190: RuntimeWarning: overflow encountered in square
  x = um.square(x, out=x)
/Users/ghost/Dev/logout/math/experiments/hcx69_hcx70_cyclotomic_activation.py:204: RuntimeWarning: overflow encountered in matmul
  return head @ x + hb

  return head @ x + hb
